stimulus:
While researching a topic, a student has taken the following notes:

  • Octavia Butler was a US writer known for her science fiction.
  • Butler's science fiction novel Parable of the Sower was published in 1993.
  • The novel won a Hugo Award nomination in 1994.
  • The Hugo Awards are given each year to the best works of science fiction and fantasy.
stem: The student wants to indicate the title of a novel by Octavia Butler that received a Hugo Award nomination. Which choice most effectively uses relevant information from the notes to accomplish this goal?

answerOptions.content: Octavia Butler is an award-recognized US writer known for her science fiction.
Octavia Butler published a science fiction novel in 1993.
One of Octavia Butler's novels was among the best works of science fiction published in the US.
Parable of the Sower, by Octavia Butler, received a Hugo Award nomination in 1994.

rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The sentence indicates the title of a novel that received a Hugo Award nomination, noting that Parable of the Sower by Octavia Butler received the nomination in 1994.

Choice A is incorrect because the sentence provides an introduction of Octavia Butler; it doesn't indicate the title of a novel that received a Hugo Award nomination. Choice B is incorrect because the sentence identifies the year that Octavia Butler published a science fiction novel; it doesn't indicate the novel's title. Choice C is incorrect because the sentence indicates that one of Butler's novels qualified for a Hugo Award; it doesn't indicate the novel's title.
